case_title: NG-LIM, ELIZABETH VS BRENNEMAN, DON VIRGIL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY NG-LIM, ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT BRENNEMAN, DON VIRGIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO DON VIRGIL BRENNEMAN.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $7,220.00 FILED BY BRENNEMAN, DON VIRGIL AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NG-LIM, ELIZABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFT'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST FILED; $10 FEE PAID; TO: FOLDER/TRAY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-14-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-14-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED; TO BE HEARD WITH CASE NO. 821967

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NG-LIM, ELIZABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRENNEMAN, DON VIRGIL $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,060.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $2000.00 THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF'S TOTAL DAMAGES TO BE $3000. AND ATTRIBUTES TWO-THIRDS OF THE FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT TO THE DEFENDANT FOR A TOTAL NET AWARD OF $2000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BRENNEMAN, DON VIRGIL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT NG-LIM, ELIZABETH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2007 ORDERED DESTROYED
DEFT'S REQUEST TO PAY JUDGEMENT TO COURT RETURNED. NO SIGNATURE OF DEFT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BRENNEMAN, DON VIRGIL
